effects.effect: Add 1 other [Pachycephalo] Vivosaur from your Discard Pile to your hand.

effects.name: Distress Call
effects.effect: Once per turn: you can add 1 [Pachycephalo] Vivosaur from your Deck to your hand, except "Pachy".

effects.name: Iron Missile
effects.effect: If you control another [Pachycephalo] Vivosaur: deal 30 damage to all Vivosaur's your Opponent controls.
